## Section D — seed constants (frozen at P3)
  split_seed          = 20260714  (synthetic dev/vault split; VAULT_MANIFEST + synthetic-specs)
  calibration_seed    = 20260717  (calib_sample_manifest.json)
  determinism_seeds   = 20260714 / 20260716 (P1 determinism runs; data/battery/det_*)
  bootstrap_seed §2.5 = OSF registration date YYYYMMDD (FROZEN-AT-P3; bound at registration)
  tranche_seed  §6    = OSF registration date YYYYMMDD (per §2.5 convention; CLI --seed, bound at registration)
  fn_audit_seed §3.6  = OSF registration date YYYYMMDD (per §2.5 convention)
  subsample_seed §3.8 = OSF registration date YYYYMMDD (per §2.5 convention)

## Section E — model snapshot pins (item07; A/B undated -> §1.1 fallback: version-header logging + B1c)
  coder A  = claude-opus-4-8            (Anthropic; undated ID + per-call version headers)
  coder B  = gemini-3.5-flash           (Google; undated ID + modelVersion logging)
  coder C  = gpt-5.5-2026-04-23         (OpenAI; immutable dated snapshot; majority adjudicator)
  coder D  = qwen3.5:4b Ollama digest 2a654d98e6fb Q4_K_M (think:false,temp0,num_ctx16384; dk-confirmed 2026-07-17)
  family E = perplexity/glm-5.2         (Z.AI; tools:[] no-search; calls 2026-07-14 gen / 2026-07-15 restyle)
  checker  = perplexity/kimi-k2.7-code  (Moonshot; tools:[] no-search)
